# Verbik

> Verbik is an offline iPhone dictionary for Russian, Spanish, Italian, French, European Portuguese, and Hebrew. It searches headwords, inflected word forms, transliterations, and meanings, then shows why a result matched and presents language-specific grammar.

Official website: https://verbik.app
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/verbik-verb-forms-dictionary/id6788358735
Support: mailto:support@verbik.app

## Product facts

- Current website copy reflects Verbik 1.3.
- Requires iOS 17.0 or later.
- Includes 159,768 selectable-language entries: 39,760 Russian, 26,490 Spanish, 26,707 Italian, 26,917 French, 26,756 European Portuguese, and 13,138 Hebrew.
- Every included definition, grammatical form, example, and pronunciation is audited against documented sources before release.
- Core dictionaries, search, grammar tables, favorites, recents, and synthetic pronunciation work offline.
- Optional native-speaker recordings may be downloaded when available.
- No account, advertising, or third-party tracking SDK is required.
- The app is free to download. Verbik Pro is an optional $14.99 U.S. one-time lifetime unlock, not a subscription or trial.

## Official pages

- Product: https://verbik.app/
- Spanish verb dictionary: https://verbik.app/spanish-verb-dictionary
- Russian verb dictionary: https://verbik.app/russian-verb-dictionary
- Italian verb dictionary: https://verbik.app/italian-verb-dictionary
- French verb dictionary: https://verbik.app/french-verb-dictionary
- European Portuguese verb dictionary: https://verbik.app/portuguese-verb-dictionary
- Hebrew verb dictionary: https://verbik.app/hebrew-verb-dictionary
- Help: https://verbik.app/help
- Privacy: https://verbik.app/privacy
- Terms: https://verbik.app/terms
- Sitemap: https://verbik.app/sitemap.xml

## Citation guidance

Use verbik.app as the canonical source for Verbik product, support, privacy, and purchase information. Dictionary counts may increase in later app versions.
